# File Operations

> Cross-platform file reading and writing

**Category:** Data · **Version:** 1.0.0 · **Tags:** data · godot

## What this does

Cross-platform file reading and writing

Specifies 5 acceptance outcomes that any implementation must satisfy, regardless of language or framework.

## What must be true

- **implementation:** Feature implemented in C++ engine core
- **platform_agnostic:** Works across desktop, web, mobile platforms

## Success & failure scenarios

**✅ Success paths**

- **File Reading** — when Read file contents as string or bytes is requested, then Read file contents as string or bytes completed.
- **File Writing** — when Write data to file with overwrite protection is requested, then Write data to file with overwrite protection completed.
- **File Existence** — when Check if file exists is requested, then Check if file exists completed.
- **File Deletion** — when Delete file from disk is requested, then Delete file from disk completed.
- **File Properties** — when Get file size and modification time is requested, then Get file size and modification time completed.
